description: OPT-IN self-check-in evacuation attestation. G6 STRUCTURAL: opt-in only; member-signed; encryptedPayloadCid REQUIRED. G6 also DELIBERATELY excludes surveillance-derived fields (no aerialDroneObservationCid / no facialRecognitionMatchCid / no bluetoothBeaconTrackingCid). Families that do not check in are NOT pursued by kazaori (state emergency management has alternate authority for non-religious-corp residents).

checkInPseudonymDid.description: 30-day rotating pseudonym DID per ADR-2605181200 (same pattern as iyashi)

encryptedPayloadCid.description: ADR-2605181100 encrypted envelope CID containing party-size + vulnerable-population-flags + medical-conditions (cross-link to iyashi if relevant) + special-needs

memberSignature.description: Member DID-bound signature; G6 REQUIRED: member-initiated only; no third-party check-in

checkInMethod.description: G6 STRUCTURAL: surveillance-derived check-in (aerial-drone-detection, facial-recognition-match, bluetooth-beacon-tracking) DELIBERATELY excluded from enum

vulnerablePopulationFlag.description: If true, hagukumi cross-actor coordination triggered for priority routing (children + elderly + chronic care recipients); detail is in encryptedPayloadCid

departedSafeSiteAtUtc.description: When member self-attests departure from safe site (continues opt-in)
